Who Is Stacy Farley?

I Built the Largest Single-Owned Implant Center in the Country. Then I Taught Everyone Else How.

I'm Stacy Farley. I spent 20+ years in sales and leadership — including 8 years leading full arch sales at New Day Smile — building a practice that generates $8 million a year — closing 40 to 50 arches every month with a close rate above 70% and only 5% of revenue going to marketing.

I didn't do it with a massive ad budget or a lucky market. I did it with a repeatable, tested sales framework — one I now teach to practice owners, DSO ops leaders, and treatment coordinators who are tired of leaving arches on the table.

Featured Program

Next Level Case Acceptance — The Membership Built for Full-Arch Sales

NLCA is the live monthly training program for dental teams who want to close more full arch cases — with a proven system, real coaching, and zero guesswork. Not pre-recorded. Not theory. The exact system that drove 40–50 arches a month.

01 The 8-Step Consult Framework — the step-by-step structure that creates a predictable, high-converting consultation
02 Mastering Objections — real scripts for "I need to think about it" and "it's too expensive"
03 Building Value Before Price — make price irrelevant before you ever present it
04 Financing as a Close Tool — use financing strategically without cutting your margins
05 The 2-Phase Consult System — doctor presents clinically, TC closes emotionally
06 Follow-Up That Converts — the exact cadence and messaging that brings undecided patients back to yes

How the Training Works

Four Ways Stacy Delivers the Framework

Every format is designed for dental operators — not passive learners. You implement while you learn.

🏫

Classroom Training

Live, in-person sessions at your practice. Stacy's team drills your TCs and staff with real scenarios.

⚙️

Full-Arch Operations Set-Up

Everything your practice needs to launch and manage the non-clinical side of full-arch dentistry — from operations to consult flow.

💻

Online Masterclass

32 video lessons. The complete framework on demand — rewatch every script as many times as needed.

🤖

Ongoing Sales Coaching

We don't disappear after the first training. Get access to real-time coaching and CoachIQ — our AI-powered tool that tracks calls and shows your team how to improve, fast.

The Full-Arch Sales Framework

4 Modules. Every Stage of the Sale.

The Masterclass follows Stacy's exact sequence — from the first phone call to a signed treatment plan. Nothing skipped. Nothing generic.

01

Lead Call

The core principles behind taking lead calls effectively — from preparation to pricing discussions. Build a strong first impression that converts inquiries into booked consultations.

02

Clinical Presentation

How to present cases, maintain professionalism, and guide patients through informed decisions — so the clinical conversation builds trust and sets up the sales discussion naturally.

03

The Foundation of Sales

The mental and strategic foundation for full arch sales — shifting from transactional selling to value-driven persuasion so your entire team operates with the right mindset and confidence.

GET THE FRAMEWORK
04

Sales Presentation

The step-by-step process for presenting, handling objections, and closing with clarity — guiding patients from curiosity to commitment without pressure, confusion, or hesitation.
